title: Modern Retail Podcast: What it takes to build a true lifestyle brand
description: The latest episode of the Modern Retail Podcast — recorded live at the Modern Retail Marketing Summit in Huntington Beach, California — gets into what it means to be a lifestyle brand, featuring Mandy Fry of Z Supply.

title: The Weekly Closeout: Pat McGrath Labs exits bankruptcy, GameStop bets on ‘retro’
description: The cosmetics company forged a deal with GDA Luma, while the gaming retailer is expanding its assortment of older products nationwide.

title: Retailers could close more than 40K stores in the next 5 years
description: Tariffs and immigration policies are weighing on the industry and could drive even more closures, UBS analysts found.

title: VF Corporation adds inventory visibility technology from Nedap
description:
Apparel and footwear giant VF Corporation is seeking a clearer view of its global inventory as it looks to better sync its digital storefronts with physical availability. The parent company of The North Face, Vans and Timberland said it’s overhauling how it tracks stock across its vast network of stores, distribution centers and supply chain […]
The post VF Corporation adds inventory visibility technology from Nedap appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Tractor Supply get help from digital sales in Q1 earnings results
description:
Tractor Supply Company’s fiscal Q1 was dragged down by customers not spending as much on their cats and dogs as they would in a more robust economy, according to CEO Harry Lawton, who spoke with analysts on the retailer’s quarterly earnings call. This is especially true for dog owners. Historically, dry kibble has been a […]
The post Tractor Supply get help from digital sales in Q1 earnings results appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Lululemon names next CEO
description:
In the same week as Apple and Best Buy, Lululemon has announced a succession plan for its CEO, effective in fall 2026. Of the three companies, Lululemon is the only one to name an external candidate as its next CEO. Lululemon said its board of directors unanimously approved Heidi O’Neill as the retailer’s next CEO. […]
The post Lululemon names next CEO appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: American Industrial Partners to acquire Honeywell warehouse automation
description:
Private equity firm American Industrial Partners (AIP) will acquire the Warehouse and Workflow Solutions (WWS) piece of Honeywell’s business. AIP did not disclose the terms of the deal, which is expected to close in the second half of 2026. Honeywell operates across logistics and warehouses, manufacturing, retail, data centers and other industries. Meanwhile, AIP’s portfolio […]
The post American Industrial Partners to acquire Honeywell warehouse automation appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Best Buy announces successor to CEO
description:
Consumer electronics retailer Best Buy has announced that current CEO Corie Barry will step down from her role at the end of October. That will also be when she steps down from her role as a member of the retailer’s board of directors, tying into when its fiscal Q3 ends on Oct. 31. Jason Bonfig, […]
The post Best Buy announces successor to CEO appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Campaign Trail: 1664 taps multiple Robert Pattinsons to examine good taste
description: The beer brand formerly known as Kronenbourg 1664 worked with agency Fold7 and director Brady Corbet to answer “A Question of Good Taste.”

title: Why relevance now beats reach in the AI-driven buyer journey
description:
Buyers are forming opinions before they click. Learn how to show up in AI answers, earn trust in peer networks, and influence decisions earlier.
The post Why relevance now beats reach in the AI-driven buyer journey appeared first on MarTech.

title: 15 HubSpot updates from March 2026 managers and admins need to know
description:
The March updates focus on giving teams more flexibility, more precise control over automation and timing.

title: From permission to personalization: Activating first-party data the right way
description:
On May 6th, learn how to activate first-party data to drive measurable results without compromising customer trust or safety.

title: Generative engine optimization KPIs that actually matter for marketing teams
description: Generative AI is changing how people discover brands, products, and information. Because it disrupts the buyer journey, it requires new metrics, specifically GEO KPIs, that accurately reflect performance within these AI engines.

title: Why agentic storefronts are the future of commerce
description: Digital commerce is at a turning point. As artificial intelligence evolves, it is no longer simply a tool to support retail transactions behind the scenes. Instead, it is becoming a leading channel through which consumers discover products and make purchases. Major technology companies like Google and Microsoft are integrating AI agents into their search, browsing […]
